prompt: Premium cinematic group portrait of five diverse young adult athletes standing in a loose horizontal formation inside a warm burnt orange photography studio. Each person has a distinct fashion forward athletic identity and confident individual pose: one wearing an oversized blue sports jersey and wide leg trousers, one in a black tank top with dark relaxed pants and sunglasses, one female athlete in cropped black sportswear with braided hair, one woman wearing a warm red training jacket with bright leggings and striped socks, and one person in an oversized dark puffer jacket with pale athletic layers. Full body composition, subjects spaced naturally with subtle variations in stance and direction, modern multicultural fitness community, editorial streetwear meets performance fashion, dramatic warm spotlighting, deep floor shadows, soft red orange gradient background, cinematic fashion campaign photography, authentic skin texture, understated expressions, medium format camera aesthetic, rich film grain, no text, no logos, no watermark.

promptZh: 高品质电影级群像，画面中包含 五位 多元背景的年轻运动员，他们以松散的横向队形站立在温暖的 焦橙色 摄影棚内。每个人都拥有独特的潮流运动风格和自信的个人姿态：一人身穿超大号蓝色运动球衣搭配阔腿裤；一人身穿黑色背心，搭配深色休闲裤和太阳镜；一位女性运动员身穿黑色短款运动装，留着编发；一位女性身穿温暖的红色训练夹克，搭配亮色紧身裤和条纹袜；还有一人身穿超大号深色羽绒服，内搭浅色运动层叠装束。全身构图，人物站位自然，姿态和朝向略有不同，展现现代多元文化健身社区风貌，编辑类街头时尚与功能性时尚的结合，戏剧性的暖色聚光灯，深邃的地板阴影，柔和的 红橙色 渐变背景，电影级时尚广告摄影，真实的皮肤质感，内敛的表情，中画幅相机美学，丰富的胶片颗粒感，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
